notes: Bundles anchor perceived value — individual totals shown as compareAtPrice create urgency
33% savings is the sweet spot: meaningful discount without margin destruction
Bundle 004 (Complete Library) at $59.99 targets power buyers; effective per-product cost is $6.00
Each bundle has a distinct audience to prevent cannibalization
List bundles separately on Etsy as additional listings — they perform best as standalone items

etsyFeePerBundle.example: Bundle 004 at $59.99: $0.20 listing + $3.90 transaction = $4.10 Etsy fees, $55.89 net
